channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: How does Google control global AI compute? #tech
item.description: Google’s reported footprint in AI compute Recent reporting describes Google as a major holder of AI compute capacity worldwide. Google controls about a quarter of global AI compute, underpinned by large scale accelerator deployments: roughly 3.8 million TPUs … [Alphabet]

item.title: The Movement That Saved a Nation
item.description: For anyone breathlessly wondering what artificial intelligence will achieve in the coming years, yesterday provided me with a remarkable answer.Time travel.Early in the morning, I received an email message from me in the year 2035, made possible by an AI agen… [Intel]

item.title: Anthropic Denies Pentagon Claims of AI ‘Kill Switch’ in Court Filing
item.description: Artificial intelligence company Anthropic has formally denied the Pentagon’s assertions that it retains control over its Claude AI models once they are deployed on classified military networks, according to a new court filing. The company stated it has “no ba… [Intel, Anthropic]

item.title: How Aramco Ventures Is Pumping $7.5 Billion Into Strategic Tech

item.title: Brockman’s diary called it a lie. Now a jury will hear it.
item.description: Jury selection begins Monday in Oakland federal court for the trial that will determine whether OpenAI’s conversion from a nonprofit to one of the most valuable companies in the world was a breach of charitable trust. Elon Musk, who co-founded OpenAI in 2015 … [OpenAI, ServiceNow]

item.title: Mall mania: Paragon, i12 Katong change hands, White Sands up for grabs
item.description: Shareholders raised questions over $24 million in fees paid to directors of Sheng Siong in 2025, ahead of its AGM. Read more at straitstimes.com. Read more at straitstimes.com.

item.title: Why did Meta cut 10% of jobs? #tech
item.description: What happened and why it matters Meta announced it will cut about 10% of its workforce—roughly 8,000 jobs—and also said it would not fill thousands of open roles as it shifts spending priorities toward AI. The reductions are framed as an efficiency move to of… [Meta]

item.title: Intel reportedly says it boosted yields by selling what would normally be 'scrap' or 'low-expectation' CPUs — customers more willing to accept lesser chips due to overwhelming CPU demand
item.description: Intel’s Investor relations team confirmed that customers are sweeping up the lower-quality chips, bringing in tangible revenue for the company. [Intel]

item.title: Colorado lawmakers grapple with limits on kids’ AI chatbot interactions — and access to adult content
item.description: "I think when you’re trying to regulate something that moves inherently faster than legislation ever could, it’s going to be a moving target," said Rep. Sean Camacho, who's sponsoring a chatbot safety bill. [Apple]
